Built for Daily
Café Service

HayHay is a specialty bakery producing laminated pastries, enriched dough, and artisan breads designed for consistent, high-rotation café environments.

Founded in Aljada's East Village as a neighborhood bakery built around daily habits and repeat visits. What began as a local gathering spot has grown into a structured production bakery supplying cafés that value consistency and craft.

Alongside our retail space, we operate a dedicated production facility. It supports wholesale partners with organized batch planning and dependable output.

Our products are developed for real service environments and designed to perform reliably across your daily operations.

Our focus is simple: controlled batch production, clear case formats, reliable supply planning, and storage flexibility for operational needs.

Why Partner With Us

Three Reasons to Choose HayHay

1

Handcrafted, Not Factory-Line

Every product is shaped, laminated, and baked in-house at our Sharjah production facility. No contract manufacturing.

2

Clean Label, No Compromise

No additives, no preservatives, no shortcuts. Our ingredient list reads like a recipe, not a chemistry textbook.

3

Built for Café Operations

Products designed for real display cases and daily service rhythms — not adapted from retail packaging.

Your First Order

Starter Case

A recommended starting selection for a café with standard morning and all-day service. All quantities meet minimum order requirements.

How We Work

Ordering & Supply

1

Production

All products are produced based on confirmed orders and scheduled production cycles. We recommend planning volume weekly or monthly depending on demand.

2

Minimum Order Quantities

MOQs are set per SKU and listed on each product page. Designed to align with standard production batch sizes, ensuring freshness and minimising waste.

3

Lead Times

Lead times vary by product and are communicated upon onboarding. Fresh products are baked to order; frozen items may be available from stock.

4

Order Confirmation

Orders must be confirmed prior to production. Minimum case quantities apply per SKU. Lead times communicated upon onboarding.

5

Delivery or Collection

Available for scheduled delivery or collection. Pick-up aligned with baking schedules. Delivery routes planned based on confirmed volume.

6

Ongoing Supply

Standing weekly orders can be arranged. Monthly projections recommended. Adjustments possible with agreed notice period.

Getting Started

Onboarding Process

1

Enquiry & Tasting

Reach out to discuss your café's needs. We'll arrange a tasting session with our core range.

2

Volume Planning

Based on your covers, trading hours, and display format, we'll recommend a starting product mix and weekly volume.

3

First Order

Your first order is confirmed with agreed quantities, delivery days, and logistics setup.

4

Ongoing Review

Regular check-ins to adjust volume, introduce seasonal products, and optimise your selection.

Pricing

Wholesale pricing is provided in a separate document. The price list includes per-unit and per-case pricing, volume discount tiers, and any applicable delivery charges. Request your copy from your account manager.

Café & Wholesale Partnerships

Ready to add handcrafted bakery products to your café? Get in touch to arrange a tasting session and discuss your needs.

partner@hayhaybakery.com
